column1: # HEXA ecosystem package registry — tab-separated, zero external deps
#   entry   — executable entry relative to package root
#   repo    — git clone URL (empty if local-only)
#   local   — local path relative to pkg/ (empty if git-only)
# Replaces pkg/registry.json — pure-bash readable, no python/jq needed.
# Lines starting with # are comments. Blank lines ignored.
